description_long: This is a classic twin-bell alarm clock with a round, metallic red body and two prominent bells on top, connected by a curved metal handle. The front face features a white dial with bold black Arabic numerals and three gold-colored hands for hours, minutes, and seconds. The clock stands on two short, angled legs, giving it stability on flat surfaces. The back side is black with several dials and switches, likely for setting the time and alarm, as well as a battery compartment. The bells and hammer mechanism are clearly visible on top, designed to produce a loud ringing sound. The overall design is retro and functional, with a glossy finish that reflects light.
description: A retro red twin-bell alarm clock with a white face, black numerals, and gold hands, featuring a glossy metallic body and prominent top bells.
description_view_0: Front view showing the white clock face with black Arabic numerals, gold hands, and the twin red bells on top.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the red metallic body and the protruding bells and legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the black back panel with adjustment dials, switches, and battery compartment.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the red body and the bell structure.
attribute_face_design: Circular white face with bold black Arabic numerals, black tick marks, and three gold hands; no additional decorations.
